name: ProxCenter-UI
description: ProxCenter is an alternative to VMware vCenter for Proxmox environments. It provides a modern, intuitive web interface to manage multiple Proxmox VE clusters and Proxmox Backup Server instances from a single pane of glass. This script installs the Community Edition bare-metal (no Docker).

notes.text: On first access, create your admin account via the web UI at http://<IP>:3000
Secrets (APP_SECRET, NEXTAUTH_SECRET) are auto-generated and stored in /opt/proxcenter/frontend/.env
